summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that ES is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $67.03. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 44.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $73.95 and a significant trendline confluence around $68.69 (formed by 9 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
